// about me

People, operations,
and cultures.

I'm a fourth-year Industrial and Information Management student at National Cheng Kung University in Tainan, originally from Indonesia. Most of my work has been about getting things done with people — coordinating teams, organizing large-scale events, supporting cross-department operations.

Last year I served as Event Chairman of Indonesian Cultural Day at NCKU — leading 180+ people across 18 divisions over 7 months, managing everything from budget and sponsors to stage production and marketing.

I'm trilingual in English, Mandarin, and Indonesian, and currently building skills in data analytics, Power BI, and AI. Graduating June 2026 and open to opportunities in operations, project management, or business development.
